topic.name: 中国与世界
topic.description: 关注中国经济、外交、安全、产业链与海外利益

overview: 今日专题“中国与世界”。共筛选 23 个高价值事件，重点关注中国相关进展、美国相关进展及全球外交、经济与安全动态。

featured.title: 中国 东盟外长关于应对中东局势演变对本地区影响及加强区域能源合作的联合声明
featured.titleZh: 中国-东盟外长关于应对中东局势演变对本地区影响及加强区域能源合作的联合声明
featured.summaryZh: 中国与东盟外长就中东局势对区域的影响发表联合声明，强调加强区域能源合作的重要性。双方旨在共同应对外部冲击，维护地区稳定。
featured.whyImportant: 该声明体现了中国与东盟在面对全球地缘政治动荡时加强区域协作的意愿。

featured.title: Nobel economist on anti-China, anti-science US, AI’s risks
featured.summary: Simon Johnson is a professor of entrepreneurship at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT). A former chief economist of the International Monetary Fund (IMF), he won a joint Nobel Prize for economics in 2024 for his research into how institutions shape national prosperity. On June 8, the British government announced Johnson as chair of its new AI Economics Institute. In this interview, conducted on the sidelines of the UBS Asian Investment Conference in Hong Kong, Johnson discussed the...
featured.titleZh: 诺贝尔经济学奖得主谈美国反华、反科学倾向及人工智能风险
featured.summaryZh: 麻省理工学院教授、诺贝尔奖得主西蒙·约翰逊在采访中讨论了美国当前的政治环境、对华政策以及人工智能带来的经济风险。他强调了制度在国家繁荣中的核心作用。
featured.whyImportant: 顶级学者的观点为理解中美科技竞争与全球经济治理提供了重要视角。

featured.title: Typhoon Noul to come closest to Hong Kong late Saturday into Sunday
featured.summary: Typhoon Noul is expected to come closest to Hong Kong between Saturday night and Sunday morning, according to the city’s weather forecaster, which is considering issuing the No 1 warning signal later on Friday. The tropical storm near the Philippines was officially named Typhoon Noul. The name, provided by North Korea, means “glowing crimson skies”. As of Friday morning, Noul was about 500km (310 miles) northeast of Manila and moving northwest at 26km/h (16mph), according to the latest track...
featured.titleZh: 台风“诺卢”预计于周六晚至周日最接近香港
featured.summaryZh: 香港天文台预计台风“诺卢”将于周末最接近香港，并考虑在周五晚些时候发出1号戒备信号。该台风目前正向西北方向移动。
featured.whyImportant: 台风可能对香港的周末交通和市民生活造成影响，需提前做好防灾准备。

featured.title: How scholar Ackbar Abbas changed the way people thought about Hong Kong
featured.summary: Ackbar Abbas, a Hong Kong-born scholar whose influence extended beyond academia to shape artists, filmmakers, writers and many others, died on July 13 at the age of 84 after a brief battle with cancer. Over decades of teaching at the University of Hong Kong (HKU) and the University of California, Irvine (UCI), Abbas did not simply analyse Hong Kong – he altered the way Hong Kong could be described. His 1997 book Hong Kong: Culture and the Politics of Disappearance was particularly influential....
featured.titleZh: 学者阿克巴·阿巴斯如何改变了人们对香港的认知
featured.summaryZh: 香港著名学者阿克巴·阿巴斯于7月13日去世，享年84岁。他通过《香港：文化与消失的政治》等著作，深刻影响了人们对香港文化与身份的理解。
featured.whyImportant: 阿巴斯的学术贡献为研究香港的文化独特性和历史变迁提供了重要框架。

featured.title: Sweden eases mining permits to cut China minerals reliance
featured.summary: Sweden has declared the mining of critical minerals and rare earths a national security interest. This will ease and expedite the permit process. The government said the step was needed to counter dependence on China.
featured.titleZh: 瑞典放宽采矿许可限制以减少对中国矿产的依赖
featured.summaryZh: 瑞典政府宣布将关键矿产和稀土开采列为国家安全利益，旨在简化并加快审批流程。此举旨在降低对中国矿产资源的依赖。
featured.whyImportant: 瑞典的政策调整反映了欧洲国家在关键原材料供应链上寻求自主的趋势。

featured.title: US sanctions on 39 Hong Kong, mainland Chinese officials will remain in place: Rubio
featured.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio has said that there will be no change to the remaining sanctions on 39 Hong Kong and mainland Chinese officials in the “near future”, while acknowledging the issue came up in a meeting with Foreign Minister Wang Yi. Rubio, Washington’s top diplomat, also said on Thursday that US President Donald Trump had allowed a national emergency declaration on Hong Kong to expire last week after determining that the “circumstances had changed”, though he did not elaborate...
featured.titleZh: 卢比奥：美国对39名香港及中国内地官员的制裁将保持不变
featured.summaryZh: 美国国务卿卢比奥表示，短期内不会取消对39名香港及中国内地官员的制裁。他同时提到，特朗普已允许一项关于香港的国家紧急状态声明到期失效。
featured.whyImportant: 美方在制裁问题上的立场持续影响中美双边关系。

featured.title: Monkeying around disrupts Hong Kong MTR services for second day in row
featured.summary: A monkey caused fresh disruption to Hong Kong’s rail services on Friday morning after it was spotted on the tracks in Tsuen Wan station, a day after a similar incident during peak hours. At 10.03am, the MTR Corporation said services on the Tsuen Wan line had to be adjusted after a monkey entered the track area, advising passengers to allow extra time for their journeys. A photo released by the railway operator showed the monkey sitting on the tracks, facing dozens of passengers on the...
featured.titleZh: 猴子连续两天扰乱香港地铁服务
featured.summaryZh: 继前一日发生类似事件后，周五上午一只猴子再次闯入荃湾线轨道，导致地铁服务被迫调整。港铁公司提醒乘客预留额外出行时间。
featured.whyImportant: 野生动物闯入城市交通枢纽引发了关于公共设施安全管理的讨论。

featured.title: Eye-rubbing, poor hygiene to blame for Chinese man’s severe mite-induced vision loss
featured.summary: A Chinese man suffered from vision loss after over a thousand mites infected his eyes, and it turned out that his life habits were to blame. The 36-year-old man in central Hubei province, surnamed Yu, experienced eye discomfort. His eyes felt dry, itchy and sticky for six months. He rubbed his eyes more vigorously, and bought eye drops, but they did not help. He then experienced a sharp decline in vision. He had his eyes checked at a clinic and was diagnosed with demodex blepharitis, an eyelid...
featured.titleZh: 揉眼和卫生习惯不佳导致中国男子严重螨虫感染致视力受损
featured.summaryZh: 一名36岁的湖北男子因长期揉眼和卫生习惯不良，导致眼部感染上千只螨虫，最终引发蠕形螨睑缘炎并导致视力严重下降。医生提醒应注意眼部卫生。
featured.whyImportant: 该案例警示公众不良生活习惯可能对眼部健康造成严重且不可逆的伤害。

global.title: Australia news live: eye health warning over GLP-1 drugs; victims of clergy abuse promised ‘full’ compensation by Christian Brothers
global.summary: Follow today’s news live Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Australian exports sent to the US will be hit with a 12.5% tariff as the US president imposes levies on more than 80 nations. The Trump administration unveiled the latest tranche of tariffs for countries over their “failure to impose and effectively enforce a prohibition on the importation of goods produced with forced labour”. This, in our view, makes no sense. Forced labour is definitely something which needs to be combated around the world, so we support that objective. We absolutely need to see the strait of Hormuz be open and for freedom of navigation to happen there, for commercial shipping to be allowed through, and we very much call on Iran to allow that to be the case. We need to see a restoration to the normal global fuel supply chain because it’s having a significant impact around the world. Continue reading...
global.titleZh: 澳大利亚新闻直播：GLP-1药物引发眼部健康警告；基督教兄弟会承诺向神职人员虐待受害者提供“全面”赔偿
global.summaryZh: 美国总统对包括澳大利亚在内的80多个国家加征12.5%的关税，理由是这些国家未能有效禁止强迫劳动产品的进口。此外，各方呼吁伊朗确保霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由，以恢复全球燃料供应链的正常运转。
global.whyImportant: 美国的新关税政策和中东航运紧张局势正对全球贸易及能源供应产生显著影响。

global.title: Democrats criticize Trump’s new tariffs as ‘end-run around the supreme court and Congress’ – as it happened
global.summary: This live blog is now closed. Trump to impose fresh wave of tariffs on more than 80 countries Sign up for the Breaking News US email By a vote of 214-208 lawmakers in the House passed a war powers resolution to curb the Trump administration’s military action in Iran, ahead of the lower chamber’s August reccess. Four Republicans, Brian Fitzpatrick, Warren Davidson, Tom Barrett and Thomas Massie, voted yes, alongside all Democrats. Continue reading...
global.titleZh: 民主党批评特朗普的新关税是“绕过最高法院和国会的手段”
global.summaryZh: 美国众议院以214票对208票通过了一项战争权力决议，旨在限制特朗普政府在伊朗的军事行动。除所有民主党人外，四名共和党议员也投了赞成票。
global.whyImportant: 此举反映了美国国会对行政部门在伊朗问题上军事决策权的制衡与分歧。

global.title: Japanese militant who took part in 1972 Israel airport attack dies in Beirut
global.summary: Kozo Okamoto, the Japanese militant who took part in a deadly attack on Tel Aviv’s airport more than five decades ago, died on Thursday in Beirut, the Palestinian group that had been protecting him said. He was 78. The Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine, a faction that is the second-largest group in the Palestine Liberation Organization, said that Okamoto had been ill for a long time. Okamoto, who made rare public appearances since he settled in Lebanon after being released from...
global.titleZh: 参与1972年以色列机场袭击事件的日本激进分子在贝鲁特去世
global.summaryZh: 曾参与1972年特拉维夫机场袭击事件的日本激进分子冈本公三在贝鲁特去世，终年78岁。巴勒斯坦解放组织下属的巴勒斯坦解放人民阵线证实了这一消息，并称其长期患病。
global.whyImportant: 冈本公三的去世标志着这一历史性恐怖袭击事件相关人物的终结。

global.title: Houthi attacks raise fears of wider Middle East conflict and more global economic damage
global.summary: The Iran-backed group in Yemen has threatened to target Saudi vessels in a vital shipping route.
global.titleZh: 胡塞武装的袭击引发了对中东冲突扩大和全球经济损失加剧的担忧
global.summaryZh: 也门的伊朗支持组织威胁要针对重要航运路线上的沙特船只。这一威胁加剧了国际社会对地区局势失控的担忧。
global.whyImportant: 该地区航运安全受威胁可能导致全球能源价格波动及供应链中断。

global.title: Qantas tests new ultra long-range Airbus in 17,000km direct flight from France to Melbourne
global.summary: Airbus A350–1000ULR becomes most watched plane on flight tracking websites as Qantas tests new aircraft for its Project Sunrise Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Qantas’s new ultra long-distance aircraft has landed on Australian soil for the first time on Friday after a 19-hour test flight from France. The Airbus A350-1000ULR, designed for Qantas to complete some of the longest commercial flights in the world, set off on a nonstop journey from Airbus’ manufacturing facility Toulouse, France on Thursday, destined for Melbourne. Continue reading...
global.titleZh: 澳洲航空测试新型空客超远程飞机，完成从法国到墨尔本的1.7万公里直飞
global.summaryZh: 澳洲航空的一架空客A350-1000ULR飞机完成了从法国图卢兹到墨尔本的19小时测试飞行。这是该机型首次抵达澳大利亚，旨在支持其超远程商业航线计划。
global.whyImportant: 此次测试是航空业实现超长距离直飞商业化的重要里程碑。

global.title: UN envoy for Yemen ‘alarmed’ by Houthis’ Red Sea attacks, calls for talks
global.summary: Hans Grundberg warns that further confrontation risks 'deepening the suffering of the Yemeni people'.
global.titleZh: 联合国也门特使对胡塞武装在红海的袭击感到“震惊”，呼吁进行谈判
global.summaryZh: 联合国特使汉斯·格伦德伯格警告称，进一步的对抗将加剧也门人民的苦难。他呼吁各方通过对话解决冲突，避免局势恶化。
global.whyImportant: 国际社会正试图通过外交途径缓解红海地区的紧张局势以保护航运安全。

global.title: Iran war live: US completes 13th night of strikes on Iran
global.summary: Trump says he is considering a ‘massive attack’, as Iran's Araghchi says 'mindless aggression' won't help a deal.
global.titleZh: 伊朗战争直播：美国完成对伊朗的第13晚空袭
global.summaryZh: 特朗普表示正在考虑进行“大规模打击”，而伊朗阿拉格齐则回应称“盲目的侵略”无助于达成协议。双方紧张局势持续升级。
global.whyImportant: 美伊军事冲突的持续升级增加了中东地区爆发全面战争的风险。

global.title: Trump vows to punish Iran for Houthi attacks in Red Sea as oil surges over US$100
global.summary: US President Donald Trump promised “major ⁠military punishment” for Iran and its Houthi allies on Thursday after the Yemeni fighters struck two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea, extending the Middle East war to a second major shipping chokepoint. Fears that disruption could widen further to block another sea route sent global oil prices surging in one of the steepest rises of the war. Brent crude rose more than 6 per cent, breaking through US$100 a barrel for the first time since May. Two weeks...
global.titleZh: 特朗普誓言就红海袭击惩罚伊朗，油价飙升至100美元以上
global.summaryZh: 在也门胡塞武装袭击两艘沙特油轮后，特朗普承诺对伊朗及其盟友进行“重大军事惩罚”。受此影响，布伦特原油价格自5月以来首次突破每桶100美元。
global.whyImportant: 地缘政治冲突直接推高了全球能源成本，对世界经济复苏构成压力。

global.title: Monkeying around disrupts Hong Kong MTR services for second day in row
global.summary: A monkey caused fresh disruption to Hong Kong’s rail services on Friday morning after it was spotted on the tracks in Tsuen Wan station, a day after a similar incident during peak hours. At 10.03am, the MTR Corporation said services on the Tsuen Wan line had to be adjusted after a monkey entered the track area, advising passengers to allow extra time for their journeys. A photo released by the railway operator showed the monkey sitting on the tracks, facing dozens of passengers on the...
global.titleZh: 猴子连续两天扰乱香港地铁服务
global.summaryZh: 继前一日发生类似事件后，周五上午一只猴子再次闯入荃湾线轨道，导致地铁服务被迫调整。港铁公司提醒乘客预留额外出行时间。

He had his eyes checked at a clinic and was diagnosed with demodex blepharitis, an eyelid...

usa.title: Middle East crisis is ‘getting out of control’, UN chief warns – as it happened
usa.summary: This live blog has not closed, you can read our latest story from the region here Earlier in the US day, before Iran’s Revolutionary Guard said it had stopped three oil tankers from passing through the strait of Hormuz, Donald Trump issued this threat on his Truth Social platform: From this point forward, any time the Islamic Republic of Iran shoots at a ship in the Strait of Hormuz, whether it be by Missile, Rocket, Drone, or any other device or weapon, the United States will bomb and destroy ONE BRIDGE OR POWER PLANT, including those located next to, or in, the Capital City of Tehran. Continue reading...
usa.titleZh: 联合国秘书长警告中东危机“正在失控”
usa.summaryZh: 在伊朗革命卫队阻止油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡后，特朗普威胁称若伊朗攻击船只，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的桥梁或发电厂。联合国秘书长对此表示深切担忧。
usa.whyImportant: 美伊双方的强硬言辞和军事威胁显著增加了地区冲突升级的风险。

usa.title: Australia ramps up Aukus funding with US$3.2 billion for nuclear submarine yard
usa.summary: Australia said on Friday it would pump an additional US$3.2 billion into building the country’s nuclear-powered submarines, part of a controversial defence pact with the United States and Britain. Under the 2021 Aukus deal, Australia’s most expensive defence project, the country will receive three nuclear-powered submarines from the United States. Australia and Britain will then build a new class of submarine in the 2040s. But the deal has faced scrutiny over whether slow submarine production...
usa.titleZh: 澳大利亚增加AUKUS资金，投入32亿美元建设核潜艇基地
usa.summaryZh: 澳大利亚宣布额外投入32亿美元用于核潜艇项目，这是AUKUS防务协议的一部分。尽管该项目旨在提升国防能力，但其生产进度一直受到外界质疑。
usa.whyImportant: 此举显示了澳大利亚在美英澳防务框架下推进军事现代化的决心。

usa.title: US sanctions on 39 Hong Kong, mainland Chinese officials will remain in place: Rubio
usa.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio has said that there will be no change to the remaining sanctions on 39 Hong Kong and mainland Chinese officials in the “near future”, while acknowledging the issue came up in a meeting with Foreign Minister Wang Yi. Rubio, Washington’s top diplomat, also said on Thursday that US President Donald Trump had allowed a national emergency declaration on Hong Kong to expire last week after determining that the “circumstances had changed”, though he did not elaborate...
usa.titleZh: 卢比奥：美国对39名香港及中国内地官员的制裁将保持不变
usa.summaryZh: 美国国务卿卢比奥表示，短期内不会取消对39名香港及中国内地官员的制裁。他同时提到，特朗普已允许一项关于香港的国家紧急状态声明到期失效。
usa.whyImportant: 美方在制裁问题上的立场持续影响中美双边关系。

usa.title: Trump ally Loomer meets Zelensky in Ukraine after dramatic U-turn on war
usa.summary: Laura Loomer, an ardent ally of US President Donald Trump with a reputation for incendiary social media commentary, sat down with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky on Thursday after a dramatic turnaround on the war that could have political reverberations back in Washington. Loomer had spent years minimising Russia’s invasion of Ukraine and amplifying Russian propaganda to her nearly 2 million followers. This week she had a change of heart. “Just experienced my first air raid in Ukraine....
usa.titleZh: 特朗普盟友卢默在对战争立场发生戏剧性转变后，在乌克兰会见泽连斯基
usa.summaryZh: 特朗普的坚定盟友劳拉·卢默在亲身体验空袭后，对乌克兰战争的立场发生重大转变，并与泽连斯基进行了会谈。这一变化可能在华盛顿引发政治反响。
usa.whyImportant: 作为特朗普核心圈成员，卢默的立场转变可能影响美国国内对乌克兰政策的讨论。

usa.title: Can science bridge the US-China trust gap? Maybe with new rules, researchers say
usa.summary: Scientific ties can be a stabilising force in relations between China and the US but as the two countries jostle for a hi-tech edge, maintaining these links will mean going beyond simple competition versus cooperation. To get there, Beijing and Washington will need to keep in continuous contact and have clearly defined boundaries, with narrower areas of collaboration. That was the finding Zhao Minghao, a professor at Fudan University’s Institute of International Studies, and Chen Yutong, a...
usa.titleZh: 研究人员称，科学能否弥合美中信任鸿沟？或许需要新规则
usa.summaryZh: 专家指出，科学合作曾是中美关系的稳定器，但在高科技竞争背景下，双方需要建立明确的合作边界。持续的沟通和界定合作领域是重建信任的关键。
usa.whyImportant: 在科技竞争加剧的背景下，探索科学合作的新模式对稳定中美关系具有重要意义。

watch.title: China targets new space-based computing network to process data born in orbit
watch.summary: China has unveiled its latest ambitious space-based computing network designed to process satellite data in orbit using AI before sending the results to Earth. Xingshu, or “Star Hub”, will eventually comprise around 1,000 satellites, according to Chi Nan, an optical communications professor at Fudan University. The network is being jointly developed by Fudan and Shanghai Xingshu Tiansuan Space Technology Co. It would offer on-demand, time-based computing services in orbit, allowing governments,...
watch.titleZh: 中国瞄准新型太空计算网络，以处理轨道产生的数据
watch.summaryZh: 中国推出了名为“星枢”的太空计算网络，旨在利用人工智能在轨道上直接处理卫星数据。该项目由复旦大学等机构联合开发，旨在提供按需的在轨计算服务。
watch.whyImportant: 太空计算技术的突破将大幅提升卫星数据的处理效率和应用价值。

watch.title: Isla Bell death: man previously accused of killing Melbourne teen loses bid to have final charge dropped
watch.summary: Marat Ganiev, 55, fails in attempt to permanently halt remaining charge of perverting the course of justice Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast The man previously charged with killing 19-year-old Melbourne woman Isla Bell has failed in his attempt to have the final charge against him relating to her death thrown out. Marat Ganiev, 55, was initially charged with the murder of Bell, 19, after her remains were found in a bag in a Dandenong rubbish tip on 20 November 2024, about six weeks after the night police believe she died. Continue reading...
watch.titleZh: 伊斯拉·贝尔死亡案：此前被控杀害墨尔本少女的男子撤销最终指控的请求被驳回
watch.summaryZh: 55岁的马拉特·加涅夫在试图永久撤销其妨碍司法公正的指控时失败。他此前曾被控谋杀19岁的伊斯拉·贝尔，该案在当地引发广泛关注。
watch.whyImportant: 法院驳回撤诉请求意味着该案的司法程序将继续进行。

watch.title: Is it all economic doom and gloom for the Philippines?
watch.summary: A potent cocktail of domestic and international political headwinds continues to weigh on the Philippines’ economic recovery, even as inflation eased in June. Economists point to turmoil in the Senate and a recent corruption scandal that rocked the nation as internal shackles holding back an already fragile economy reeling from energy shocks and extreme weather. Dutch financial think tank ING said in a recent report that political uncertainties compounded the Philippines’ economic pressures...
watch.titleZh: 菲律宾经济前景是否一片黯淡？
watch.summaryZh: 尽管6月份通胀有所缓解，但菲律宾经济仍面临国内政治动荡和腐败丑闻的压力。分析人士指出，政治不确定性加剧了该国在能源冲击和极端天气下的经济脆弱性。
watch.whyImportant: 政治环境的不稳定正成为制约菲律宾经济复苏的关键因素。

items.title: 中国 东盟外长关于应对中东局势演变对本地区影响及加强区域能源合作的联合声明
items.titleZh: 中国-东盟外长关于应对中东局势演变对本地区影响及加强区域能源合作的联合声明
items.summaryZh: 中国与东盟外长就中东局势对区域的影响发表联合声明，强调加强区域能源合作的重要性。双方旨在共同应对外部冲击，维护地区稳定。
items.whyImportant: 该声明体现了中国与东盟在面对全球地缘政治动荡时加强区域协作的意愿。

items.title: Nobel economist on anti-China, anti-science US, AI’s risks
items.summary: Simon Johnson is a professor of entrepreneurship at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT). A former chief economist of the International Monetary Fund (IMF), he won a joint Nobel Prize for economics in 2024 for his research into how institutions shape national prosperity. On June 8, the British government announced Johnson as chair of its new AI Economics Institute. In this interview, conducted on the sidelines of the UBS Asian Investment Conference in Hong Kong, Johnson discussed the...
items.titleZh: 诺贝尔经济学奖得主谈美国反华、反科学倾向及人工智能风险
items.summaryZh: 麻省理工学院教授、诺贝尔奖得主西蒙·约翰逊在采访中讨论了美国当前的政治环境、对华政策以及人工智能带来的经济风险。他强调了制度在国家繁荣中的核心作用。
items.whyImportant: 顶级学者的观点为理解中美科技竞争与全球经济治理提供了重要视角。

items.title: Typhoon Noul to come closest to Hong Kong late Saturday into Sunday
items.summary: Typhoon Noul is expected to come closest to Hong Kong between Saturday night and Sunday morning, according to the city’s weather forecaster, which is considering issuing the No 1 warning signal later on Friday. The tropical storm near the Philippines was officially named Typhoon Noul. The name, provided by North Korea, means “glowing crimson skies”. As of Friday morning, Noul was about 500km (310 miles) northeast of Manila and moving northwest at 26km/h (16mph), according to the latest track...
items.titleZh: 台风“诺卢”预计于周六晚至周日最接近香港
items.summaryZh: 香港天文台预计台风“诺卢”将于周末最接近香港，并考虑在周五晚些时候发出1号戒备信号。该台风目前正向西北方向移动。
items.whyImportant: 台风可能对香港的周末交通和市民生活造成影响，需提前做好防灾准备。

items.title: How scholar Ackbar Abbas changed the way people thought about Hong Kong
items.summary: Ackbar Abbas, a Hong Kong-born scholar whose influence extended beyond academia to shape artists, filmmakers, writers and many others, died on July 13 at the age of 84 after a brief battle with cancer. Over decades of teaching at the University of Hong Kong (HKU) and the University of California, Irvine (UCI), Abbas did not simply analyse Hong Kong – he altered the way Hong Kong could be described. His 1997 book Hong Kong: Culture and the Politics of Disappearance was particularly influential....
items.titleZh: 学者阿克巴·阿巴斯如何改变了人们对香港的认知
items.summaryZh: 香港著名学者阿克巴·阿巴斯于7月13日去世，享年84岁。他通过《香港：文化与消失的政治》等著作，深刻影响了人们对香港文化与身份的理解。
items.whyImportant: 阿巴斯的学术贡献为研究香港的文化独特性和历史变迁提供了重要框架。

items.title: Sweden eases mining permits to cut China minerals reliance
items.summary: Sweden has declared the mining of critical minerals and rare earths a national security interest. This will ease and expedite the permit process. The government said the step was needed to counter dependence on China.
items.titleZh: 瑞典放宽采矿许可限制以减少对中国矿产的依赖
items.summaryZh: 瑞典政府宣布将关键矿产和稀土开采列为国家安全利益，旨在简化并加快审批流程。此举旨在降低对中国矿产资源的依赖。
items.whyImportant: 瑞典的政策调整反映了欧洲国家在关键原材料供应链上寻求自主的趋势。

items.title: US sanctions on 39 Hong Kong, mainland Chinese officials will remain in place: Rubio
items.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio has said that there will be no change to the remaining sanctions on 39 Hong Kong and mainland Chinese officials in the “near future”, while acknowledging the issue came up in a meeting with Foreign Minister Wang Yi. Rubio, Washington’s top diplomat, also said on Thursday that US President Donald Trump had allowed a national emergency declaration on Hong Kong to expire last week after determining that the “circumstances had changed”, though he did not elaborate...
items.titleZh: 卢比奥：美国对39名香港及中国内地官员的制裁将保持不变
items.summaryZh: 美国国务卿卢比奥表示，短期内不会取消对39名香港及中国内地官员的制裁。他同时提到，特朗普已允许一项关于香港的国家紧急状态声明到期失效。
items.whyImportant: 美方在制裁问题上的立场持续影响中美双边关系。

items.title: Monkeying around disrupts Hong Kong MTR services for second day in row
items.summary: A monkey caused fresh disruption to Hong Kong’s rail services on Friday morning after it was spotted on the tracks in Tsuen Wan station, a day after a similar incident during peak hours. At 10.03am, the MTR Corporation said services on the Tsuen Wan line had to be adjusted after a monkey entered the track area, advising passengers to allow extra time for their journeys. A photo released by the railway operator showed the monkey sitting on the tracks, facing dozens of passengers on the...
items.titleZh: 猴子连续两天扰乱香港地铁服务
items.summaryZh: 继前一日发生类似事件后，周五上午一只猴子再次闯入荃湾线轨道，导致地铁服务被迫调整。港铁公司提醒乘客预留额外出行时间。
items.whyImportant: 野生动物闯入城市交通枢纽引发了关于公共设施安全管理的讨论。

items.title: Eye-rubbing, poor hygiene to blame for Chinese man’s severe mite-induced vision loss
items.summary: A Chinese man suffered from vision loss after over a thousand mites infected his eyes, and it turned out that his life habits were to blame. The 36-year-old man in central Hubei province, surnamed Yu, experienced eye discomfort. His eyes felt dry, itchy and sticky for six months. He rubbed his eyes more vigorously, and bought eye drops, but they did not help. He then experienced a sharp decline in vision. He had his eyes checked at a clinic and was diagnosed with demodex blepharitis, an eyelid...
items.titleZh: 揉眼和卫生习惯不佳导致中国男子严重螨虫感染致视力受损
items.summaryZh: 一名36岁的湖北男子因长期揉眼和卫生习惯不良，导致眼部感染上千只螨虫，最终引发蠕形螨睑缘炎并导致视力严重下降。医生提醒应注意眼部卫生。
items.whyImportant: 该案例警示公众不良生活习惯可能对眼部健康造成严重且不可逆的伤害。

items.title: Australia news live: eye health warning over GLP-1 drugs; victims of clergy abuse promised ‘full’ compensation by Christian Brothers
items.summary: Follow today’s news live Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Australian exports sent to the US will be hit with a 12.5% tariff as the US president imposes levies on more than 80 nations. The Trump administration unveiled the latest tranche of tariffs for countries over their “failure to impose and effectively enforce a prohibition on the importation of goods produced with forced labour”. This, in our view, makes no sense. Forced labour is definitely something which needs to be combated around the world, so we support that objective. We absolutely need to see the strait of Hormuz be open and for freedom of navigation to happen there, for commercial shipping to be allowed through, and we very much call on Iran to allow that to be the case. We need to see a restoration to the normal global fuel supply chain because it’s having a significant impact around the world. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚新闻直播：GLP-1药物引发眼部健康警告；基督教兄弟会承诺向神职人员虐待受害者提供“全面”赔偿
items.summaryZh: 美国总统对包括澳大利亚在内的80多个国家加征12.5%的关税，理由是这些国家未能有效禁止强迫劳动产品的进口。此外，各方呼吁伊朗确保霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由，以恢复全球燃料供应链的正常运转。
items.whyImportant: 美国的新关税政策和中东航运紧张局势正对全球贸易及能源供应产生显著影响。

items.title: Democrats criticize Trump’s new tariffs as ‘end-run around the supreme court and Congress’ – as it happened
items.summary: This live blog is now closed. Trump to impose fresh wave of tariffs on more than 80 countries Sign up for the Breaking News US email By a vote of 214-208 lawmakers in the House passed a war powers resolution to curb the Trump administration’s military action in Iran, ahead of the lower chamber’s August reccess. Four Republicans, Brian Fitzpatrick, Warren Davidson, Tom Barrett and Thomas Massie, voted yes, alongside all Democrats. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 民主党批评特朗普的新关税是“绕过最高法院和国会的手段”
items.summaryZh: 美国众议院以214票对208票通过了一项战争权力决议，旨在限制特朗普政府在伊朗的军事行动。除所有民主党人外，四名共和党议员也投了赞成票。
items.whyImportant: 此举反映了美国国会对行政部门在伊朗问题上军事决策权的制衡与分歧。

items.title: Japanese militant who took part in 1972 Israel airport attack dies in Beirut
items.summary: Kozo Okamoto, the Japanese militant who took part in a deadly attack on Tel Aviv’s airport more than five decades ago, died on Thursday in Beirut, the Palestinian group that had been protecting him said. He was 78. The Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine, a faction that is the second-largest group in the Palestine Liberation Organization, said that Okamoto had been ill for a long time. Okamoto, who made rare public appearances since he settled in Lebanon after being released from...
items.titleZh: 参与1972年以色列机场袭击事件的日本激进分子在贝鲁特去世
items.summaryZh: 曾参与1972年特拉维夫机场袭击事件的日本激进分子冈本公三在贝鲁特去世，终年78岁。巴勒斯坦解放组织下属的巴勒斯坦解放人民阵线证实了这一消息，并称其长期患病。
items.whyImportant: 冈本公三的去世标志着这一历史性恐怖袭击事件相关人物的终结。

items.title: Houthi attacks raise fears of wider Middle East conflict and more global economic damage
items.summary: The Iran-backed group in Yemen has threatened to target Saudi vessels in a vital shipping route.
items.titleZh: 胡塞武装的袭击引发了对中东冲突扩大和全球经济损失加剧的担忧
items.summaryZh: 也门的伊朗支持组织威胁要针对重要航运路线上的沙特船只。这一威胁加剧了国际社会对地区局势失控的担忧。
items.whyImportant: 该地区航运安全受威胁可能导致全球能源价格波动及供应链中断。

items.title: Qantas tests new ultra long-range Airbus in 17,000km direct flight from France to Melbourne
items.summary: Airbus A350–1000ULR becomes most watched plane on flight tracking websites as Qantas tests new aircraft for its Project Sunrise Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Qantas’s new ultra long-distance aircraft has landed on Australian soil for the first time on Friday after a 19-hour test flight from France. The Airbus A350-1000ULR, designed for Qantas to complete some of the longest commercial flights in the world, set off on a nonstop journey from Airbus’ manufacturing facility Toulouse, France on Thursday, destined for Melbourne. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 澳洲航空测试新型空客超远程飞机，完成从法国到墨尔本的1.7万公里直飞
items.summaryZh: 澳洲航空的一架空客A350-1000ULR飞机完成了从法国图卢兹到墨尔本的19小时测试飞行。这是该机型首次抵达澳大利亚，旨在支持其超远程商业航线计划。
items.whyImportant: 此次测试是航空业实现超长距离直飞商业化的重要里程碑。

items.title: UN envoy for Yemen ‘alarmed’ by Houthis’ Red Sea attacks, calls for talks
items.summary: Hans Grundberg warns that further confrontation risks 'deepening the suffering of the Yemeni people'.
items.titleZh: 联合国也门特使对胡塞武装在红海的袭击感到“震惊”，呼吁进行谈判
items.summaryZh: 联合国特使汉斯·格伦德伯格警告称，进一步的对抗将加剧也门人民的苦难。他呼吁各方通过对话解决冲突，避免局势恶化。
items.whyImportant: 国际社会正试图通过外交途径缓解红海地区的紧张局势以保护航运安全。

items.title: Iran war live: US completes 13th night of strikes on Iran
items.summary: Trump says he is considering a ‘massive attack’, as Iran's Araghchi says 'mindless aggression' won't help a deal.
items.titleZh: 伊朗战争直播：美国完成对伊朗的第13晚空袭
items.summaryZh: 特朗普表示正在考虑进行“大规模打击”，而伊朗阿拉格齐则回应称“盲目的侵略”无助于达成协议。双方紧张局势持续升级。
items.whyImportant: 美伊军事冲突的持续升级增加了中东地区爆发全面战争的风险。

items.title: Trump vows to punish Iran for Houthi attacks in Red Sea as oil surges over US$100
items.summary: US President Donald Trump promised “major ⁠military punishment” for Iran and its Houthi allies on Thursday after the Yemeni fighters struck two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea, extending the Middle East war to a second major shipping chokepoint. Fears that disruption could widen further to block another sea route sent global oil prices surging in one of the steepest rises of the war. Brent crude rose more than 6 per cent, breaking through US$100 a barrel for the first time since May. Two weeks...
items.titleZh: 特朗普誓言就红海袭击惩罚伊朗，油价飙升至100美元以上
items.summaryZh: 在也门胡塞武装袭击两艘沙特油轮后，特朗普承诺对伊朗及其盟友进行“重大军事惩罚”。受此影响，布伦特原油价格自5月以来首次突破每桶100美元。
items.whyImportant: 地缘政治冲突直接推高了全球能源成本，对世界经济复苏构成压力。

items.title: Middle East crisis is ‘getting out of control’, UN chief warns – as it happened
items.summary: This live blog has not closed, you can read our latest story from the region here Earlier in the US day, before Iran’s Revolutionary Guard said it had stopped three oil tankers from passing through the strait of Hormuz, Donald Trump issued this threat on his Truth Social platform: From this point forward, any time the Islamic Republic of Iran shoots at a ship in the Strait of Hormuz, whether it be by Missile, Rocket, Drone, or any other device or weapon, the United States will bomb and destroy ONE BRIDGE OR POWER PLANT, including those located next to, or in, the Capital City of Tehran. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 联合国秘书长警告中东危机“正在失控”
items.summaryZh: 在伊朗革命卫队阻止油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡后，特朗普威胁称若伊朗攻击船只，美国将摧毁伊朗境内的桥梁或发电厂。联合国秘书长对此表示深切担忧。
items.whyImportant: 美伊双方的强硬言辞和军事威胁显著增加了地区冲突升级的风险。

items.title: Australia ramps up Aukus funding with US$3.2 billion for nuclear submarine yard
items.summary: Australia said on Friday it would pump an additional US$3.2 billion into building the country’s nuclear-powered submarines, part of a controversial defence pact with the United States and Britain. Under the 2021 Aukus deal, Australia’s most expensive defence project, the country will receive three nuclear-powered submarines from the United States. Australia and Britain will then build a new class of submarine in the 2040s. But the deal has faced scrutiny over whether slow submarine production...
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚增加AUKUS资金，投入32亿美元建设核潜艇基地
items.summaryZh: 澳大利亚宣布额外投入32亿美元用于核潜艇项目，这是AUKUS防务协议的一部分。尽管该项目旨在提升国防能力，但其生产进度一直受到外界质疑。
items.whyImportant: 此举显示了澳大利亚在美英澳防务框架下推进军事现代化的决心。

items.title: Trump ally Loomer meets Zelensky in Ukraine after dramatic U-turn on war
items.summary: Laura Loomer, an ardent ally of US President Donald Trump with a reputation for incendiary social media commentary, sat down with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky on Thursday after a dramatic turnaround on the war that could have political reverberations back in Washington. Loomer had spent years minimising Russia’s invasion of Ukraine and amplifying Russian propaganda to her nearly 2 million followers. This week she had a change of heart. “Just experienced my first air raid in Ukraine....
items.titleZh: 特朗普盟友卢默在对战争立场发生戏剧性转变后，在乌克兰会见泽连斯基
items.summaryZh: 特朗普的坚定盟友劳拉·卢默在亲身体验空袭后，对乌克兰战争的立场发生重大转变，并与泽连斯基进行了会谈。这一变化可能在华盛顿引发政治反响。
items.whyImportant: 作为特朗普核心圈成员，卢默的立场转变可能影响美国国内对乌克兰政策的讨论。

items.title: Can science bridge the US-China trust gap? Maybe with new rules, researchers say
items.summary: Scientific ties can be a stabilising force in relations between China and the US but as the two countries jostle for a hi-tech edge, maintaining these links will mean going beyond simple competition versus cooperation. To get there, Beijing and Washington will need to keep in continuous contact and have clearly defined boundaries, with narrower areas of collaboration. That was the finding Zhao Minghao, a professor at Fudan University’s Institute of International Studies, and Chen Yutong, a...
items.titleZh: 研究人员称，科学能否弥合美中信任鸿沟？或许需要新规则
items.summaryZh: 专家指出，科学合作曾是中美关系的稳定器，但在高科技竞争背景下，双方需要建立明确的合作边界。持续的沟通和界定合作领域是重建信任的关键。
items.whyImportant: 在科技竞争加剧的背景下，探索科学合作的新模式对稳定中美关系具有重要意义。

items.title: China targets new space-based computing network to process data born in orbit
items.summary: China has unveiled its latest ambitious space-based computing network designed to process satellite data in orbit using AI before sending the results to Earth. Xingshu, or “Star Hub”, will eventually comprise around 1,000 satellites, according to Chi Nan, an optical communications professor at Fudan University. The network is being jointly developed by Fudan and Shanghai Xingshu Tiansuan Space Technology Co. It would offer on-demand, time-based computing services in orbit, allowing governments,...
items.titleZh: 中国瞄准新型太空计算网络，以处理轨道产生的数据
items.summaryZh: 中国推出了名为“星枢”的太空计算网络，旨在利用人工智能在轨道上直接处理卫星数据。该项目由复旦大学等机构联合开发，旨在提供按需的在轨计算服务。
items.whyImportant: 太空计算技术的突破将大幅提升卫星数据的处理效率和应用价值。

items.title: Isla Bell death: man previously accused of killing Melbourne teen loses bid to have final charge dropped
items.summary: Marat Ganiev, 55, fails in attempt to permanently halt remaining charge of perverting the course of justice Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast The man previously charged with killing 19-year-old Melbourne woman Isla Bell has failed in his attempt to have the final charge against him relating to her death thrown out. Marat Ganiev, 55, was initially charged with the murder of Bell, 19, after her remains were found in a bag in a Dandenong rubbish tip on 20 November 2024, about six weeks after the night police believe she died. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 伊斯拉·贝尔死亡案：此前被控杀害墨尔本少女的男子撤销最终指控的请求被驳回
items.summaryZh: 55岁的马拉特·加涅夫在试图永久撤销其妨碍司法公正的指控时失败。他此前曾被控谋杀19岁的伊斯拉·贝尔，该案在当地引发广泛关注。
items.whyImportant: 法院驳回撤诉请求意味着该案的司法程序将继续进行。

items.title: Is it all economic doom and gloom for the Philippines?
items.summary: A potent cocktail of domestic and international political headwinds continues to weigh on the Philippines’ economic recovery, even as inflation eased in June. Economists point to turmoil in the Senate and a recent corruption scandal that rocked the nation as internal shackles holding back an already fragile economy reeling from energy shocks and extreme weather. Dutch financial think tank ING said in a recent report that political uncertainties compounded the Philippines’ economic pressures...
items.titleZh: 菲律宾经济前景是否一片黯淡？
items.summaryZh: 尽管6月份通胀有所缓解，但菲律宾经济仍面临国内政治动荡和腐败丑闻的压力。分析人士指出，政治不确定性加剧了该国在能源冲击和极端天气下的经济脆弱性。
items.whyImportant: 政治环境的不稳定正成为制约菲律宾经济复苏的关键因素。
